page.title: Invite Members
page.description: Send invitations and manage invitation lifecycle with live backend data.
page.accessDeniedTitle: You do not have permission to access this page.

form.title: Send New Invitations
form.description: Enter multiple emails separated by comma, space, or new line. Backend accepts maximum 50 emails per request.
form.emptyEmails: Added emails will appear here as tags.
form.notePlaceholder: Dear team, welcome to our workspace...
form.noteHint: Optional. This note is included in the invitation email and kept for future resends. {count}/2000 text characters
form.footerHint: Role assignment is handled after member joins organization.

registry.title: Invitation Registry
registry.description: Track invitation status and perform resend/cancel actions.
registry.searchPlaceholder: Search by email, inviter, invite ID...

table.empty: No invitations found with current filters.

details.title: Invitation Details
details.description: Review invitation metadata and run supported actions.

errors.noResendPermission: You do not have permission to resend invitations.
errors.noCancelPermission: You do not have permission to cancel invitations.
errors.noCreatePermission: You do not have permission to create invitations.
errors.enterAtLeastOneEmail: Please enter at least one valid email address.
errors.maxEmailsPerRequest: You can invite at most 50 email addresses per request.
errors.noteTooLong: Invitation note must be 2000 text characters or fewer.
errors.markupTooLong: Invitation note markup is too long. Please simplify the formatting.
errors.enterEmailBeforeAdding: Please enter at least one valid email address before adding.
errors.allEmailsAlreadyAdded: All valid email addresses in this input are already added.
errors.maxEmailsForTags: You can add at most 50 email addresses per request.
errors.someEmailsSkipped: Some entries were skipped because they are invalid: {preview}
errors.noPendingInPage: No pending invitations to resend on this page.

page.title: Organization Members
page.description: Manage organization members and inspect membership details.
page.accessDeniedTitle: You do not have permission to access this page.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, user ID...

table.empty: No members found with current filters.

removeDialog.title: Remove Member
removeDialog.description: This action will remove {target} from the organization and revoke organization-scoped roles.

toasts.failedToRemove: Failed to remove member from organization.

page.title: Roles & Permissions
page.description: Create custom roles, manage role permissions, and assign roles to organization members.
page.accessDeniedTitle: You do not have permission to access this page.

registry.title: Role Registry
registry.description: Create custom roles and manage existing ones. Click a role to view details and permissions.
registry.empty: No roles found. Create your first role above.

memberAssignment.title: Member Role Assignment
memberAssignment.description: Assign or revoke roles for organization members. Protected roles are not assignable from this UI.
memberAssignment.empty: This member has no assigned roles.

view.title: Role Details
view.description: View role metadata and assigned permissions.

edit.description: Edit role metadata and permission codes.
edit.protectedDescription: This role is protected by organization policy. Editing and permission changes are disabled.
edit.noPermissionsFound: No permissions found for current filter.

delete.title: Delete Role
delete.description: This action will permanently delete role {roleName} and revoke all related assignments.

toasts.failedToAssignMemberRole: Failed to assign role to member.
toasts.failedToRevokeMemberRole: Failed to revoke role from member.

errors.invalidOrExpired: Invitation token is invalid or has expired.
errors.expired: This invitation token has expired. Ask an admin to resend a new invitation.
errors.invalid: This invitation token is invalid. Please check the invitation link again.

card.processingDescription: We are validating your token and adding you to the organization.
card.errorDescription: Please verify the invitation link or ask an admin to send a new invitation.

alerts.processingDescription: Please wait a moment. You will be redirected automatically after the invitation is accepted.
